pathAssistantSteps.info: Indicates that generation is no longer required. Transition to this status is automatic when the Job’s end date is now in the past.
Indicates that all Work Schedule based Shift Demands for the Job have been generated. Transition to this status is automatic.
Indicates that the Job scheduling is ongoing and that Shift Demands are to be generated. Transition to this status is manual.
The initial status for a Job, as set when the Job is first created.
